metadata.description: Victor's Claude Code plugins — statusline, coding skills, sysadmin skills, multi-agent harness, repo security vetting, and Notion↔gbrain sync.

plugins.name: agent-harness
plugins.description: Multi-agent harness for Claude Code: Planner→Generator→Evaluator sprints executed as background dynamic workflows (Agent-tool fallback), fable/opus/sonnet/haiku model routing with per-role reasoning effort, harness-engineering framework for design/diagnosis, and Anthropic 2026-04-04 P-G-E pattern.

plugins.name: claude-statusline
plugins.description: Zero-dependency statusline for Claude Code with rainbow progress bar, 10 themes, rate limit monitoring, and natural language configuration.

plugins.name: coding-skills
plugins.description: Opinionated coding skills for TypeScript, React, and Python — spec-driven interface design, TDD workflows, SOLID principles, and code review.

plugins.name: gbrain-notion-sync
plugins.description: Sync Notion PAI second-brain (Projects, To-Do, Inbox, Knowledge Base) into local gbrain knowledge graph for fast Claude Code retrieval. Provides /notion-sync slash command with pull / schedule / postprocess / status / doctor sub-commands.

plugins.name: repo-vet
plugins.description: Pre-use security vetting for third-party repositories — static analysis for credential theft, hidden outbound connections, install-time attacks, obfuscated payloads, and supply-chain risks.

plugins.name: sysadmin-skills
plugins.description: ITIL 4-based IT operations skills for system administrators — incident response, change management with CAB review, and status communication.
